sdks.name: Python
sdks.description: Idiomatic Python client. Synchronous and async transports, typed request/response models, retries with exponential backoff.

sdks.name: TypeScript / JavaScript
sdks.description: Typed client for Node and modern browsers. ESM and CJS entry points, generated from the OpenAPI spec, fetch-based transport.

sdks.name: Go
sdks.description: Generated Go client with context-aware methods and structured error types. No reflection on the hot path.

sdks.name: Java
sdks.description: Java 11+ client with builder-style request construction. Pluggable HTTP transport; OkHttp by default.

sdks.name: Kotlin
sdks.description: Coroutine-first Kotlin client. Suspending functions, sealed result types, idiomatic null handling.

sdks.name: Scala
sdks.description: Scala 3 client. Effect-system-agnostic core with thin Future and cats-effect bindings.

sdks.name: PHP
sdks.description: PSR-7 / PSR-18 client for PHP 8.1+. Strict types, enum responses, predictable exception hierarchy.

sdks.name: Ruby
sdks.description: Ruby 3 client. Block-form pagination, Faraday-based transport, typed Struct responses.

sdks.name: C# / .NET
sdks.description: Net 8 client with async/await throughout. Source-generated System.Text.Json serialization; AOT-compatible.

sdks.name: Rust
sdks.description: Async Rust client over reqwest. Strongly typed request and response structs; serde everywhere.

sdks.name: Swift
sdks.description: Swift 5.9+ async/await client. Codable models, structured concurrency, iOS and macOS targets.

sdks.name: Lua
sdks.description: FreeSWITCH mod_lua client. Call into the VoiceTel API from dialplan scripts without leaving the runtime.

tooling.name: VoiceTel CLI
tooling.description: Interactive REPL for the VoiceTel API. Command history, tab autocomplete, and one-shot scripted invocations. Drives every v2.2.10 operation from the terminal.

tooling.name: API Collections
tooling.description: Pre-built Postman and Bruno collections covering all 74 v2.2.10 operations. Environment templates for API key and base URL included.
